ci_commands_discovered: pnpm lint - ESLint check (from package.json scripts and .github/workflows/check.yaml)
pnpm typecheck - TypeScript type checking (from package.json scripts and .github/workflows/check.yaml)
pnpm format:check - Prettier format check (from package.json scripts)
pnpm test - Runs tests across packages (from package.json and .github/workflows/test.yaml) - SKIPPED due to >120s runtime
p2p_enrichment.docker_environment_issue: Node.js and pnpm are not installed in the Dockerfile. The validate agent needs to add: 1) Node.js >=24.3.0 (from package.json engines), 2) pnpm 10.32.1 (via corepack enable), 3) Run 'pnpm install --frozen-lockfile' during image build
tests_added: test_repo_typecheck() - runs 'pnpm typecheck' (runs 'tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit' in each package)
files_updated: tests/test_outputs.py - added _pnpm_cmd() helper and 3 new pass_to_pass tests
eval_manifest.yaml - added 3 new pass_to_pass checks for repo lint/typecheck/format
p2p_enrichment.notes: The remix repo is a pnpm monorepo. CI runs: pnpm lint (eslint), pnpm typecheck (tsc --noEmit in each package), pnpm format:check (prettier --check .), and pnpm test (full test suite). Added pass_to_pass tests for lint, typecheck, and format_check. The full test suite (pnpm test) is too heavy (>120s with Playwright browser installs) and was skipped for p2p gates. The _pnpm_cmd() helper handles the case where pnpm is not in PATH by using corepack enable.
